passive.name: Fired Up!
passive.description: Milio's abilities enchant allies on touch, making their next damage deal a burst of extra damage and burn the target.

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Milio's''' [[champion ability|ability]] hits on himself and allied {{tip|champions}} grant an enchantment for 4 seconds, which causes the next basic attack or ability hit against enemies to deal {{as|{{pp|7;11;15|1;6;9|key=%}} of enchanted target's AD}} {{ccs|{{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}}|magic}} and apply a burn that deals{{ft|{{as|{{pp|10 to 50}}|magic damage}} {{as|(+ 20% of '''Milio's''' AP)}} {{as|magic damage}} over {{fd|1.5}} seconds.|{{as|{{pp|10/6 to 50/6|round=2}}|magic damage}} {{as|(+ {{ap|20/6|round=2}}% of '''Milio's''' AP)}} {{as|magic damage}} every {{fd|0.25}} seconds over {{fd|1.5}} seconds.}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* Both the burst and the burn respect {{tip|enchantment redirection}}.
* Subsequent applications of ''Fired Up!'' only refresh the duration.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will not block the effect if applied by a basic attack.
<!--Blurb-->
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Milio's''' abilities enchant allied {{tip|champions}} on-contact, causing their next basic attack or ability hit shortly after to apply a {{ccs|burst|magic}} and then a short burn to the target enemy, both parts dealing {{as|magic damage}}.

Q.name: Ultra Mega Fire Kick
Q.description: Kick a ball that knocks back an enemy. The ball launches upward on hit and falls toward the enemy, damaging and slowing enemies in the area upon impact.
Q.tooltip:
Milio kicks a fireball, Knocking Back the first enemy hit. If it hits, the ball bounces past them and explodes, dealing {{ damage }} magic damage to surrounding enemies and Slowing them by {{ slowamountpercent }} for {{ slowduration }} seconds.

Hitting at least one enemy champion with Ultra Mega Fire Kick refunds {{ refundratio*100 }}% of it's Mana cost.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} After a {{fd|0.25}}-second delay, '''Milio''' kicks a fireball in the target direction that grants {{tip|sight}} of its path and {{tip|airborne|knocks back}} and {{tip|stun|stuns}} the first enemy it hits over 1 second.
wiki_detail.description2: Upon collision, the ball bounces once in the {{tt|same|parallel to original cast direction}} direction from the target's location, granting sight of the area before exploding in the same radius after a brief delay, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit and {{tip|slow|slowing}} them for {{fd|1.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.leveling2:
{{st|Magic Damage|{{ap|80 to 320}} {{as|(+ 120% AP)}}}}
{{st|Slow|{{ap|40 to 60}}% {{as|(+ 5% per 100 AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: If the primary target is a non-champion, the ball knocks back further and creates a larger explosion. ''Ultra Mega Fire Kick'' refunds 50% of its {{sti|{{as|mana cost}}}} if it hits at least one champion with the fireball or explosion.
wiki_detail.description4: '''''Milio''' cannot cast other abilities during Ultra Mega Fire Kick's delay.''
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tip|sight|icononly=true}} {{tt|100|Sight radius of missile}} / {{tip|cr|icononly=true}} {{tt|250|Champion hit reveal and explosion radius}} / {{tt|275|Minion hit reveal and explosion radius}} / {{tt|190|Champion knock back distance}}
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Milio''' kicks a fireball in the target direction that briefly {{tip|airborne|knocks back}} and {{tip|stun|stuns}} the first enemy hit. The ball then bounces once toward the target and explodes, dealing {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|slow|slowing}} enemies hit.
wiki_detail.blurb2: If the primary target is a non-champion, the ball knocks back further and creates a larger explosion.

W.name: Cozy Campfire
W.description: Create an empowering zone that heals allies and increases attack range to those inside. The zone follows the ally nearest to the cast point.
W.tooltip:
Milio creates a hearth that follows ally champions for {{ zoneduration }} seconds. Ally champions nearby gain {{ rangepercent }} Attack Range and restore {{ healingovertime }} Health over the duration. The hearth also applies Fired Up! every {{ healfrequencyseconds }} seconds.

Recast: Change the hearth's follow ally.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Milio''' summons a fuemigo at the target location or upon the target allied champion for 6 seconds that follows the nearest allied champion and grants {{tip|sight}} of its surroundings. Allied champions near the fuemigo gain {{sti|'''bonus''' attack range}} equal to a percentage of their '''base''' attack range and {{tip|heal}} every {{rutngt|0.25}} over the duration.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Base Attack Range Scaling|{{ap|10 to 20}}%}}
{{st|Heal per Tick|{{ap|70/25 to 150/25}} {{as|(+ {{ap|15/25}}% AP)}}|Total Heal|{{ap|70 to 150}} {{as|(+ 15% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: ''Cozy Campfire'' can be recast after {{fd|0.5}} seconds within the duration.
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Milio''' commands the fuemigo to follow the target allied champion to within {{tip|cr|icononly=true}} 150-units, placing the recast on a {{sti|cd|{{fd|0.5}}}}-second {{tt|static|Unaffected by ability haste}} cooldown.
wiki_detail.description4: '''''Milio''' counts as an allied champion for this ability. Cozy Campfire may grant {{ai|Fired Up!|Milio}} upon being summoned and at most once every 3 seconds thereafter.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* The {{sti|attack range}} increase lingers on allies for the entire duration of ''Cozy Campfire'', even if they leave the zone.
<!--Blurb-->
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Milio''' summons a fuemigo that lasts for 6 seconds and follows the closest allied champion. Allied champions near the fuemigo gain increased {{sti|attack range}} and are continually {{tip|heal|healed}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Recast:}} The fuemigo follows the target allied champion.

E.name: Warm Hugs
E.description: Milio tosses a shield to an ally, temporarily increasing their movement speed. This ability has 2 charges.
E.tooltip:
Milio wraps an ally champion in protective flames, granting {{ shieldcalc }} Shield and {{ movespeedamount*100 }}% Move Speed for {{ movespeedduration }} seconds.

This ability has 2 charges and the effects stack on repeat targets.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Milio''' envelops himself or the target allied champion in protective flames, granting the target a {{tip|shield}} and {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} for {{fd|2.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Shield Strength|{{ap|45 to 165}} {{as|(+ 45% AP)}}}}
{{st|Bonus Movement Speed|{{ap|12 to 20}}%}}
wiki_detail.description2: '''Milio''' periodically [[stock]]s a ''Warm Hugs'' charge, up to a maximum of 2.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Warm Hugs' effects can stack up to 2 times.''
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Milio''' envelops himself or the target ally in protective flames, granting them a {{tip|shield}} and {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' move speed}}}} for a short time.
wiki_detail.blurb2: '''Milio''' periodically [[stock]]s a ''Warm Hugs'' charge, up to a maximum of 2. The effects can stack up to 2 times.

R.name: Breath of Life
R.description: Milio unleashes a wave of soothing flames that heal and remove crowd control effects from allies in range.
R.tooltip: Milio unleashes a wave of soothing flames on nearby ally champions, cleansing Disabling and Immobilizing effects, restoring {{ healcalc }} Health, and granting {{ tenacityamount*100 }}% Tenacity for {{ tenacityduration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Milio''' explodes in soothing flames, {{tip|heal|healing}} and {{tip|cleanse|cleansing}} himself and nearby allied champions of non-{{tip|airborne}} {{tip|crowd control}}, and granting them 65% {{tip|tenacity}} for 3 seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: '''''Milio''' cannot cast his other abilities for {{fd|0.75}} seconds after Breath of Life's activation. Breath of Life cannot be used while affected by {{tip|cast-inhibiting crowd control}}.''
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Milio''' explodes in soothing flames, {{tip|heal|healing}} and {{tip|cleanse|cleansing}} himself and nearby allied champions of non-{{tip|airborne}} {{tip|crowd control}}, and granting them {{tip|tenacity}} for short time.
